skills.title: Don and doff a dry suit
skills.description: Don and doff a dry suit — with assistance from another diver if required by the suit model.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct donning and doffing, with buddy assistance if needed.

skills.title: Surface buoyancy control
skills.description: Demonstrate how to perform a buoyancy check at the surface wearing a dry suit with undergarment (if needed) and full scuba equipment.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct buoyancy check at surface with dry suit and full equipment.

skills.title: Neutral buoyancy — controlled rise and fall (1 min)
skills.description: Demonstrate neutral buoyancy by gently rising and falling in a controlled manner while inhaling and exhaling for one minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled rise and fall using breathing only for ≥ 1 minute.

skills.title: Hover near the bottom (1 min)
skills.description: Demonstrate neutral buoyancy by hovering near the bottom (without using arms or fins) for one minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Stable hover ≥ 1 minute without arm or fin movement.

skills.title: Disconnect and reconnect inflator hose underwater
skills.description: Underwater, disconnect the inflator hose from the dry suit inflator valve and reconnect it.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled disconnect and reconnect of inflator hose underwater.

skills.title: Neutrally buoyant ascent (max 9 m/min)
skills.description: Perform a neutrally buoyant ascent from the bottom at a maximum ascent rate of 9 metres / 30 feet per minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Ascent ≤ 9 m/min, neutral buoyancy maintained.

skills.title: Recovery from air in the feet
skills.description: Demonstrate a technique to recover to a normal position when too much air migrates to the feet.
skills.performanceStandard: Successful recovery to normal position from feet-up inversion.

skills.title: Remove and replace scuba unit and weight system at surface
skills.description: Remove and replace the scuba unit and weight system at the surface.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled removal and replacement of scuba unit and weight system at surface.

skills.title: Don and doff a dry suit
skills.description: Don and doff a dry suit with assistance from another diver.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct donning and doffing with buddy assistance.

skills.title: Weight check for neutral buoyancy
skills.description: Adjust the amount of weight needed for neutral buoyancy at the surface (eyes at water line) while holding a normal breath with both dry suit and BCD fully deflated.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct weighting: eyes at water line on normal breath, suit and BCD deflated.

skills.title: Controlled descent without suit squeeze
skills.description: Perform a controlled descent without experiencing a suit squeeze.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled descent; suit inflated in time, no squeeze.

skills.title: Neutral buoyancy — controlled rise and fall (1 min)
skills.description: Demonstrate neutral buoyancy by gently rising and falling in a controlled manner while inhaling and exhaling for one minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled rise and fall using breathing only for ≥ 1 minute.

skills.title: Hover near the bottom without arm/leg movement (1 min)
skills.description: Maintain neutral buoyancy near the bottom by hovering for one minute without arm or leg movement.
skills.performanceStandard: Stable hover ≥ 1 minute without arm or leg movement.

skills.title: Neutral buoyancy without sediment disturbance
skills.description: Maintain neutral buoyancy throughout the dive, avoiding accidental sediment disturbance or bottom contact.
skills.performanceStandard: No bottom contact or sediment disturbance throughout the dive.

skills.title: Neutrally buoyant ascent (max 9 m/min)
skills.description: Perform a neutrally buoyant ascent from the bottom at a maximum ascent rate of 9 metres / 30 feet per minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Ascent ≤ 9 m/min, neutral buoyancy maintained.

skills.title: Safety stop at 5 m (≥ 3 min)
skills.description: Perform a safety stop at 5 metres / 15 feet for at least three minutes.
skills.performanceStandard: Safety stop at 5 m for ≥ 3 minutes.

skills.title: Remove and replace scuba unit and weight system at surface
skills.description: Remove and replace both the scuba unit and the weight system at the surface.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled removal and replacement of scuba unit and weight system at surface.

skills.title: Don and doff a dry suit
skills.description: Don and doff a dry suit, with assistance from another diver if required by the suit model.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct donning and doffing, with buddy assistance if needed.

skills.title: Controlled descent without suit squeeze
skills.description: Perform a controlled descent without experiencing a suit squeeze.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled descent; suit inflated in time, no squeeze.

skills.title: Disconnect and reconnect inflator hose with gloves
skills.description: Underwater, wearing gloves, disconnect the inflator hose from the suit and reconnect it.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled disconnect and reconnect of inflator hose while wearing gloves.

skills.title: Neutral buoyancy without sediment disturbance / reef contact
skills.description: Maintain neutral buoyancy throughout the dive without accidentally disturbing sediment and/or touching the reef.
skills.performanceStandard: No sediment disturbance or reef contact throughout the dive.

skills.title: Neutrally buoyant ascent (max 9 m/min)
skills.description: Perform a neutrally buoyant ascent from the bottom at a maximum ascent rate of 9 metres / 30 feet per minute.
skills.performanceStandard: Ascent ≤ 9 m/min, neutral buoyancy maintained.

skills.title: Safety stop at 5 m (≥ 3 min)
skills.description: Perform a safety stop at 5 metres / 15 feet for at least three minutes.
skills.performanceStandard: Safety stop at 5 m for ≥ 3 minutes.
